response.global_analysis: 1. Audio & Transcription: Transcribed Japanese lyrics from the concert live performance and the talk segment at the end, ensuring absolute phonetic accuracy. 2. Translation & Context: Context-aware translations that respect semantic continuity, particularly for poetic song lyrics. 3. Timing: Synchronized starting timestamps precisely with the audio, maintaining logical boundaries for both song lines and spoken dialogue.

subtitles.original: 連れ出す舟よ
subtitles.english: O ship that carries me away,

subtitles.original: 祝福して
subtitles.english: bless me,

subtitles.original: 嵐の向こう
subtitles.english: beyond the storm.

subtitles.original: 進むのなら 朽ち果てたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if it decays as we move forward,

subtitles.original: 枯れない 魂まで奪わぬよう
subtitles.english: so that even my undying soul will not be stolen.

subtitles.original: 永遠の美貌 そんな幻 どうだっていいでしょう
subtitles.english: Eternal beauty, such an illusion doesn't matter, does it?

subtitles.original: 手放せ 翼はついたから
subtitles.english: Let go of it, for I have grown wings.

subtitles.original: さあ行こう 夜明けに舵を向けて
subtitles.english: Now, let's go, steering the rudder towards the dawn.

subtitles.original: 風に吹かれて 誰も気づかぬよう
subtitles.english: Fanned by the wind, as if no one notices,

subtitles.original: 区別がつかない モノクロの世界
subtitles.english: a monochrome world that cannot be distinguished.

subtitles.original: 色を足しても 何も見えなくて
subtitles.english: Even if I add color, I cannot see anything,

subtitles.original: まるで私は 息を止めていた
subtitles.english: as if I had stopped breathing.

subtitles.original: もういいよ 遠くても 叶えたい 私は
subtitles.english: It's alright now, even if it's far, I want to make it come true...

subtitles.original: この世界 惑いも 抱きしめていたいのに
subtitles.english: Even though I want to embrace the hesitations in this world,

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに 描き続ける意味は
subtitles.english: the meaning of continuing to paint on the canvas of dreams...

subtitles.original: この胸に 輝いている ストーリー
subtitles.english: is the story shining in this heart.

subtitles.original: 溺れることに 意味などないけれど
subtitles.english: There is no meaning in drowning, but...

subtitles.original: 拾い集めた 欠片 失うの
subtitles.english: will I lose the fragments I've gathered?

subtitles.original: そして夜は その冷たさを 溶かして手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: And so, the night melted away that coldness and reached out its hand.

subtitles.original: もういいよ 遠くても 届けたい 私は
subtitles.english: It's alright now, even if it's far, I want to reach you...

subtitles.original: 抜け出す 涙も 抱きしめていたいのに
subtitles.english: Even though I want to embrace the tears that escape...

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに 心込めるのは
subtitles.english: putting my heart into the canvas of dreams...

subtitles.original: この空に 描き出していく ストーリー
subtitles.english: is the story I will draw in this sky.

subtitles.original: そして夜は その冷たさを 溶かして手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: And so, the night melted away that coldness, reaching out its hand...

subtitles.original: もういいの 遠くても 叶えたい 私の
subtitles.english: It's enough now, even if it's far, I want to make it come true...

subtitles.original: この世界 言葉で包んだ
subtitles.english: my world wrapped in words.

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに 色を足していく
subtitles.english: Adding color to the canvas of dreams...

subtitles.original: この胸に 今輝いて
subtitles.english: now shining in this heart.

subtitles.original: 強くなくてもいい 壊れかけてもいい
subtitles.english: It's fine if I'm not strong, it's fine if I'm breaking,

subtitles.original: この心は 永久に羽ばたいて
subtitles.english: this heart will flap its wings for eternity.

subtitles.original: 響くように 塗り替えていく 私色
subtitles.english: I'll repaint it in my own colors so it resonates.

subtitles.original: Hello, everyone!
subtitles.english: Hello, everyone!

subtitles.original: It is Day 2 of Drawn to Dawn!
subtitles.english: It is Day 2 of Drawn to Dawn!

subtitles.original: Yes, yes. Welcome to Day 2 of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis' first concert, Drawn to Dawn!
subtitles.english: Yes, yes. Welcome to Day 2 of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis' first concert, Drawn to Dawn!
